title: hedyotis diffusa var. extensa
intro: Hedyotis diffusa var. extensa, also known as the buttercup flower or Chinese numbers, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent chronic diseases.
